name: Rubble-Choked Nook
description: A collapsed side tunnel packed with fallen stone. A narrow gap at the top lets in a faint draft, but there is no way through. Something glints between the rocks.

name: Abandoned Campsite
description: A circle of sooty stones surrounds a long-dead fire. Bedrolls have been shredded by claws, and scattered supplies lie half-buried in dirt.

name: Rat Nest
description: The tunnel ends in a heap of gnawed cloth, bones, and filth. The stench is overwhelming. Dozens of tiny eyes watch from the tangled mass.

name: Dripping Pool
description: A shallow pool of clear water fed by a slow drip from the ceiling. The walls are slick with moisture and pale mineral deposits.

name: Collapsed Mine Shaft
description: Rotting timbers and heaped stone mark where a mine shaft caved in. Rusted tools poke from the debris, and the air tastes of old dust.

name: Rough-Hewn Passage
description: A crude tunnel hacked through soft stone by picks long abandoned. Tool marks cover every surface, and the ceiling is uncomfortably low.

name: Root-Tangled Corridor
description: Tree roots push through the ceiling and walls, cracking the stone apart. You duck under thick tendrils and step over gnarled stumps.

name: Rubble-Strewn Corridor
description: Loose stones litter the floor of this uneven passage. Every step sends pebbles skittering into the darkness ahead, announcing your presence.

name: Drafty Tunnel
description: A cold wind funnels through this narrow passage, carrying the smell of earth and rain. Somewhere above, there is an opening to the surface.

name: Cobweb Passage
description: Thick webs stretch from wall to wall in dusty curtains. You push through them with each step, trailing silk behind you like a bridal train.

name: Mine Cart Track
description: Rusted iron rails run along the floor, partially buried in dirt. A derailed mine cart lies on its side, its contents long looted.

name: Seeping Corridor
description: Water oozes from every crack in the walls, leaving the floor a muddy slick. Boot prints from some earlier visitor have filled with brown water.

name: Torchlit Passage
description: Spent torches line the walls in crude iron brackets. One still gutters with a feeble orange flame, as if someone passed through only hours ago.

name: Old Supply Room
description: A widened chamber with rough-cut shelves carved into the walls. Rotting sacks and smashed crates litter the floor, but a few containers remain sealed.

name: Three-Way Junction
description: The tunnel opens into a low-ceilinged chamber where three passages converge. Scratched arrows on the walls point in contradictory directions.

name: Goblin Squatters' Den
description: A chamber strewn with crude bedding, gnawed bones, and graffiti scratched into the walls in a language you cannot read. The goblins may return.

name: Mushroom Patch
description: A damp chamber where pale mushrooms carpet the floor in clusters. The air is earthy and close. Some of these may be edible, but you would rather not guess.

name: Echoing Chamber
description: A round chamber where every sound bounces endlessly off the domed ceiling. Whispered words come back as shouts, and dripping water sounds like drumbeats.

name: Exposed Ore Vein
description: Picks and chisels lie abandoned around a seam of dull metal exposed in the wall. Someone started mining here and stopped in a hurry.

name: The Old Well
description: A stone well sits in the center of this chamber, its rope frayed and its bucket missing. The water far below reflects your torchlight back as a single cold eye.

name: Bone Heap
description: Animal bones are heaped in the corner of this chamber — the leavings of something with a healthy appetite. Claw marks score the walls at shoulder height.

name: Warren Crossroads
description: A broad cavern where multiple tunnels converge. Cairns of stacked stones mark each exit, left by explorers who may or may not have found their way out.

name: Sinkhole Cavern
description: The floor has partially collapsed into a deeper level, leaving a jagged sinkhole at the center. Tunnels branch off at different heights around the rim.

name: Pillar Hall
description: Natural stone pillars hold up a high ceiling in this spacious cavern. Torchlight barely reaches the walls, and your footsteps echo from every direction.

name: Gravel Slide
description: A wide cavern where the floor slopes steeply in loose gravel. Tunnels open at various heights along the walls, connected by the unstable scree.

name: Spore-Choked Alcove
description: A cramped hollow thick with luminescent spores. The air is almost too dense to breathe. Something glints beneath a carpet of tiny mushrooms.

name: Collapsed Mycelium Den
description: A cave-in has sealed this chamber on three sides. Fungal tendrils probe through the rubble, slowly reclaiming the space.

name: Bioluminescent Passage
description: A narrow tunnel lined with pulsing blue-green fungi. The walls breathe with a slow, rhythmic glow that makes your shadow dance.

name: Dripping Spore Tunnel
description: Moisture beads on every surface. Fat drops of spore-laden water fall from the ceiling at irregular intervals, splashing into shallow puddles.

name: Root-Woven Corridor
description: Thick mycelium roots crisscross the passage like a web. You have to push through curtains of dangling tendrils that leave a phosphorescent residue on your skin.

name: Mushroom Garden
description: An open chamber where mushrooms grow in organized clusters, almost like someone planted them. Caps range from fist-sized to taller than a man.

name: Spore Nursery
description: Thick clouds of luminescent spores drift through the air in lazy spirals. Massive mushroom caps form a canopy overhead, dripping with condensation.

name: Fungal Cathedral
description: An enormous cavern where towering mushroom stalks rise like pillars to a ceiling lost in darkness. A deep thrumming vibration fills the space, as if the entire cave is breathing.

name: Puffball Pocket
description: A cramped hollow filled with enormous puffball mushrooms. The slightest touch sends clouds of choking spores into the air.

name: Rot Pit
description: The tunnel ends at a pit of decomposing organic matter. Fungal threads web across the surface, slowly breaking down something large and unidentifiable.

name: Phosphor Grotto
description: A tiny grotto where every surface glows with intense blue-green light. The brightness is almost painful after the dark tunnels.

name: Slime Vein Passage
description: A tunnel where thick veins of luminescent slime run along the walls like arteries. They pulse rhythmically, pushing something viscous deeper into the cave system.

name: Canopy Crawl
description: Mushroom caps have grown together overhead, forming a living ceiling. You crawl through a tunnel of stems and gills, spores raining down with each bump.

name: Tendril Walk
description: Long fungal tendrils dangle from the ceiling like a bead curtain. They retract when touched, then slowly reach out again once you pass.

name: Decomposition Lane
description: The floor is soft and spongy, composed entirely of decomposing fungal matter. Each step sinks ankle-deep, releasing the sweet stench of rot.

name: Sporefall Chamber
description: A wide chamber where spores fall from the ceiling in a constant gentle rain. They drift like snow, accumulating in soft drifts against the walls.

name: Lichen Throne Room
description: A natural throne of stone sits at the back of this chamber, completely covered in luminous lichen. The seat is warm to the touch.

name: Feeding Hollow
description: A chamber where fungal growths have engulfed the remains of some large creature. Bones jut from the mycelium, slowly being dissolved and absorbed.

name: The Bloom Cavern
description: An immense cavern where the fungal growth has exploded into riotous variety. Thousands of species compete for space on every surface in a kaleidoscope of color and light.

name: Mycelium Nexus
description: A sprawling cavern where thick mycelium roots converge from every tunnel into a central mass. The ground throbs with a slow heartbeat.

name: Crystal Cul-de-Sac
description: The tunnel ends at a wall of solid crystal. Your reflection stares back at you from a hundred facets, each slightly wrong.

name: Shattered Geode
description: A massive geode split open by some ancient force. Amethyst crystals line the interior, and something metallic glints near the back.

name: Refraction Gallery
description: Light from an unknown source bounces between crystal formations, filling the tunnel with shifting prismatic patterns. Shadows have color here.

name: Singing Passage
description: Air moving through the crystal formations produces an eerie, harmonious tone. The pitch changes with the wind, creating an unsettling melody.

name: Mirror Tunnel
description: Every surface is polished crystal. The tunnel seems to extend infinitely in every direction, reflections within reflections making navigation disorienting.

name: Amethyst Vault
description: A chamber lined with deep purple amethyst. The crystals hum with stored energy, and the air tastes metallic and charged.

name: Lattice Chamber
description: Interlocking crystal formations create a complex lattice throughout the room. Moving through requires careful navigation between razor-sharp edges.

name: The Prism Vault
description: A vast open space where enormous crystal columns support the ceiling. A single beam of light from above splits into a thousand colors, illuminating the chamber in perpetual rainbow.

name: Quartz Tomb
description: A figure lies encased in solid quartz at the back of this alcove, perfectly preserved. Its expression is peaceful, and one hand clutches something bright.

name: Fractured Lens
description: A single massive crystal has cracked into a dozen pieces, scattering light into chaotic patterns. The fragments are sharp and unstable.

name: Resonance Pocket
description: A tiny chamber where the crystals hum at a frequency you can feel in your teeth. Standing here too long makes your vision blur.

name: Shard Gauntlet
description: Crystal spikes jut from the walls at irregular angles, narrowing the passable space to a winding path. One wrong step means a nasty cut.

name: Chime Passage
description: Thin crystal stalactites hang from the ceiling like wind chimes. Your passing sets off a cascade of ringing notes that echo far ahead.

name: Dichroic Drift
description: The crystals here shift color depending on the angle of view — green from one direction, purple from another. Navigating by sight alone is treacherous.

name: Geode Squeeze
description: The tunnel passes through the hollow interior of an enormous geode. Amethyst and citrine line every surface in sparkling abundance.

name: Frosted Crystal Tube
description: A smooth-walled tube of milky white crystal, cold to the touch. Your breath fogs in the chill air, and ice crystals form on every surface.

name: Harmonic Gallery
description: Crystals of varying sizes are arranged in concentric rings, each producing a different tone when struck. Something intelligent placed them this way.

name: Growth Chamber
description: Crystals are still actively growing here, fed by mineral-rich water seeping through the rock. New formations sprout visibly over minutes.

name: Kaleidoscope Room
description: Polished crystal surfaces on every wall turn the chamber into a living kaleidoscope. Moving your torch creates a dizzying whirl of reflected light.

name: The Crystal Garden
description: A vast cavern where crystal formations grow in delicate, plant-like shapes — trees, flowers, ferns, all rendered in gleaming mineral. Beautiful and utterly silent.

name: Faceted Dome
description: A dome-shaped cavern where every surface is a flat crystal facet. Light enters from a crack above and bounces infinitely, filling the space with blinding brilliance.

name: Sunken Storeroom
description: A flooded room with shelves of waterlogged supplies. Crates bob in the waist-deep water, their contents long ruined — but not all of them.

name: Tidal Pool
description: A dead-end chamber with a deep pool in its center. The water is crystal clear, revealing smooth stones and something glinting at the bottom.

name: Waterfall Passage
description: Water cascades down one wall in a thin sheet, filling the tunnel with a constant roar. The floor is slick with algae and treacherous underfoot.

name: Drowned Corridor
description: Knee-deep water fills this passage. Things bump against your legs in the murky current — driftwood, hopefully, though they feel too smooth.

name: Brackish Channel
description: A canal of dark, salt-smelling water runs through the center of this passage. Barnacles coat the lower walls in thick clusters.

name: Flooded Shrine
description: An ancient shrine half-submerged in dark water. Corroded statues reach upward from beneath the surface, their features worn smooth by centuries of submersion.

name: Kelp Forest
description: Impossibly tall kelp grows from the flooded floor to the ceiling. The fronds sway in unseen currents, and things move between the stalks.

name: The Drowned Atrium
description: A vast chamber where the water reaches your chest. Ancient pillars rise from the flood, supporting a vaulted ceiling dripping with moisture. Multiple passages branch off at different water levels.

name: Drowned Larder
description: A pantry chamber where preserved food floats in sealed clay jars. The water has been here long enough for blind fish to colonize the shelves.

name: Sump Hole
description: The tunnel slopes downward into a completely flooded sump. The water is black and still, and something large moved beneath the surface just now.

name: Fossil Pool
description: A still pool where ancient fossils are visible in the rock beneath the water. Spiral shells and strange bones frozen in stone for millennia.

name: Spillway
description: Water rushes through this sloped tunnel in a fast-moving sheet. You brace against the walls to avoid being swept off your feet.

name: Condensation Tunnel
description: Every surface weeps with condensation. Droplets gather and run in rivulets down the walls, and the air is so humid it feels like breathing water.

name: Pipe Gallery
description: Ancient clay pipes run along the ceiling, most cracked and pouring water. This was once part of a drainage system for something built long ago.

name: Algae Chute
description: A steep passage coated in thick green algae. The footing is treacherous, and a thin stream of water makes the descent even more perilous.

name: Cistern
description: A vaulted chamber that once served as a water cistern. The water level has risen to fill it halfway, and stone walkways ring the edges above the flood.

name: Bioluminescent Pool
description: A wide chamber with a glowing turquoise pool. Tiny luminous creatures drift through the water, casting wavering light on the ceiling.

name: Cascade Hall
description: Water falls from a crack in the high ceiling in a thin cascade, filling the chamber with white noise. Mist hangs in the air like fog.

name: The Sunken Forum
description: A vast flooded hall with the remains of carved stone benches arranged in tiers. Whatever met here is long gone, but the architecture speaks of purpose and ceremony.

name: Burial Niche
description: A small alcove packed with neatly stacked bones. In the center, a single skeleton sits upright, hands folded around something.

name: Collapsed Crypt
description: A crypt whose ceiling has partially caved in. Broken sarcophagi spill their contents across the floor. Among the bones, something catches the light.

name: Skull-Lined Passage
description: Every inch of wall is set with skulls, staring with empty sockets. The passage is narrow enough that you brush against them as you pass.

name: Whispering Gallery
description: A long corridor where the dry air carries faint whispers. The bones in the walls seem to shift when you are not looking directly at them.

name: Vertebrae Arch
description: The ceiling is formed from interlocking vertebrae, creating a ribbed arch that creaks and groans as you pass beneath it.

name: Ossuary Chapel
description: A chapel built entirely from human remains. A chandelier of femurs hangs from the ceiling. Candles of pale wax burn without flickering.

name: Bone Mill
description: A chamber with a massive stone wheel in its center, caked with ancient bone dust. Channels in the floor once directed ground marrow somewhere deeper.

name: The Great Ossuary
description: A cathedral-sized chamber where bones form everything — walls, pillars, arches, and a grotesque altar at its center. The air is perfectly dry and carries the faintest scent of incense.

name: Sealed Sarcophagus
description: A single stone sarcophagus sits in this cramped chamber, its lid slightly ajar. The scratches on the inside of the lid suggest its occupant tried to get out.

name: Marrow Font
description: A stone basin filled with dark liquid stands against the back wall. The fluid is warm and smells of iron. Bones line the walls in devotional patterns.

name: Tooth Grotto
description: Thousands of teeth have been pressed into the walls of this tiny chamber in spiraling patterns. The floor crunches underfoot with loose molars.

name: Ribcage Corridor
description: Enormous ribcages arch over the passage like the skeleton of a great beast. You walk through its chest cavity, bones creaking overhead.

name: Dust Walk
description: The floor is thick with powdered bone. Your footprints fill in slowly behind you, as if something is smoothing them away.

name: Clicking Passage
description: Finger bones dangle from sinew threads in the ceiling, clicking against each other as you pass. The sound follows you down the corridor.

name: Pelvis Arch Walk
description: The tunnel passes through a series of massive pelvis bones arranged as arches. Each is from a different and increasingly larger creature.

name: Cartilage Squeeze
description: A narrow passage where the walls are lined with ancient cartilage, still rubbery after centuries. It flexes as you push through.

name: Reliquary
description: A chamber of niches, each holding a single skull on a stone shelf. Some have offerings placed before them — coins, beads, dried flowers turned to dust.

name: Charnel Pit
description: A deep pit in the center of this chamber is filled with jumbled bones. Arm bones, leg bones, and skulls all tossed in without ceremony. Something moves at the bottom.

name: Scrimshaw Gallery
description: Every bone surface in this room has been carved with intricate scenes — battles, feasts, births, and deaths. A civilization's history etched into its own remains.

name: The Catacomb Atrium
description: A towering atrium where stacked burial shelves rise to dizzying heights. Ladders of lashed bones connect the levels, and tunnels open at every tier.

name: Cooled Lava Tube
description: A lava tube that has cooled and sealed at the far end. The walls are smooth obsidian, and trapped gas pockets pop and hiss occasionally.

name: Forge Alcove
description: A natural alcove where the heat is intense enough to have been used as a forge. Abandoned tools and half-finished metalwork litter the ground.

name: Magma Vein
description: A narrow passage with a crack of flowing magma running down its center. The heat is oppressive, and the air shimmers with convection.

name: Cinder Drift
description: A tunnel choked with volcanic ash. Each step sends up clouds of grey dust. The walls are warm to the touch and crumble if pressed.

name: Obsidian Gullet
description: A passage lined with smooth volcanic glass. Your reflection walks alongside you, distorted by the curved surfaces into something barely recognizable.

name: Sulfur Vent Chamber
description: A wide chamber where sulfurous gas vents from cracks in the floor. Yellow crystals have formed around the vents. The stench is overwhelming.

name: Basalt Pillars
description: Hexagonal basalt columns rise from floor to ceiling in geometric perfection. Lava flows between them in narrow channels, casting everything in amber light.

name: The Crucible
description: A massive cavern dominated by a lake of slowly churning magma. Basalt islands connected by natural stone bridges create a treacherous network above the molten rock.

name: Slag Heap
description: A chamber choked with cooled slag and volcanic debris. The heat still radiates from deeper layers, and the air shimmers above the pile.

name: Fumarole Vent
description: A dead end where superheated steam jets from cracks in the floor. Yellow sulfur crystals crust the vent edges. The heat is barely tolerable.

name: Petrified Forge
description: An ancient smithy sealed by a lava flow. The anvil, tongs, and half-finished blade are all perfectly preserved in stone, frozen mid-swing.

name: Ember Drift
description: Glowing embers float through the air like fireflies, carried on thermals from below. They wink out against your skin with tiny stings.

name: Pumice Corridor
description: The walls are rough pumice that crumbles at a touch. The floor is littered with lightweight volcanic stone that crunches underfoot.

name: Lava Tube
description: A smooth-walled tube carved by ancient lava flow. The stone is glassy and dark, reflecting your torchlight in warped ribbons.

name: Sulfur Stink
description: A passage where the sulfur stench is so thick your eyes water. Yellow deposits coat the walls, and the air burns in your throat.

name: Heat Shimmer Passage
description: The air here is so hot it shimmers and bends. Distances are impossible to judge, and the far end of the tunnel seems to ripple like a mirage.

name: Lava Blister
description: A dome-shaped chamber formed by a trapped gas bubble in ancient lava. The walls are smooth obsidian, and the floor is uncomfortably warm.

name: Scoria Garden
description: A chamber where jagged scoria formations rise from the floor like a petrified garden. Veins of glowing magma thread between them like irrigation channels.

name: Ash Fall Chamber
description: Fine volcanic ash drifts from cracks in the ceiling in a slow, constant fall. It coats everything in grey and muffles all sound.

name: The Caldera
description: An immense cavern shaped like a volcanic crater. Magma churns far below, and stone ledges spiral down the inner walls like a descending staircase. Tunnels open at every level.

name: Obsidian Atrium
description: A vast chamber of polished obsidian where your reflection walks beside you in every surface. Lava pools glow at the perimeter, and the heat radiates from below.

name: Crystallized Fungal Grotto
description: A transitional space where bioluminescent fungi grow on crystalline walls. The crystals amplify the glow into blinding patterns. Mushrooms sprout from cracks in the formations.

name: Submerged Crystal Garden
description: Crystal formations grow beneath clear water, creating an underwater garden of sharp beauty. The light refracts through the water, painting the ceiling in shifting colors.

name: Flooded Catacombs
description: Brackish water fills an ancient catacomb. Bones float in the murky current, occasionally assembling into shapes before drifting apart.

name: The Bone Kiln
description: A chamber where volcanic heat has calcified everything. Skeletons are fused to the walls in twisted poses, baked into the stone itself. The heat is stifling.

name: Thermal Bloom Tunnel
description: Volcanic heat feeds enormous fungi that thrive in the warmth. Giant mushrooms glow orange instead of blue, heated from within by geothermal vents.

name: The Confluence
description: A vast natural crossroads where all biomes meet. Crystals jut from bone walls, water trickles over volcanic rock, and mushrooms grow in every crevice. The air tastes of everything and nothing.

name: Crystal Forge
description: A chamber where volcanic heat has forged enormous crystals. They glow from within with trapped magma, creating pillars of frozen fire.

name: Subterranean Marsh
description: Ankle-deep stagnant water supports a forest of pale mushrooms. Bioluminescent algae paints the water's surface in shifting green patterns.

name: The Gravepool
description: A still pool of dark water in a bone-lined chamber. Skeletons lie submerged beneath the surface, their eye sockets staring upward through the murk.

name: Rot Garden
description: Mushrooms feed on ancient remains here, sprouting from skulls and ribcages. The cycle of death and growth has been repeating for centuries.

name: Mold-Creep Tunnel
description: Rough-hewn stone gives way to thick mold growth. The surface transitions sharply — bare rock on one side, living carpet on the other.

name: Quartz Seam Chamber
description: A rough cave where a seam of raw quartz has been partially mined. Crystal fragments litter the floor among rusted tools and abandoned crates.

name: Flooded Mine Shaft
description: A vertical shaft descends into black water. A frayed rope and a broken winch hang over the edge. Whatever they were mining is now under ten feet of flood.

name: Shallow Crypt
description: A crude burial chamber just below the surface. Wooden coffins have rotted away, spilling their contents across the dirt floor. The bones are old but not ancient.

name: Warm Draft Passage
description: A tunnel where the air is unexpectedly warm. Cracks in the floor glow faintly orange, and the rough stone walls are hot to the touch. Something burns far below.

name: Mossy Crystal Hollow
description: A chamber where small crystals push through beds of green moss. The soft glow of luminescent fungus mixes with prismatic sparkle in eerie beauty.

name: Sunken Grave Pit
description: A mass grave that has flooded. Bones float in brown water, bumping against the walls with the current. Mud and death share this space equally.

name: Scorched Vein
description: A narrow passage where heat-cracked crystals line one wall and the other radiates volcanic warmth. Mineral deposits glow where the two forces meet.

name: Swamp Hollow
description: A low-ceilinged chamber where standing water has allowed pale mushrooms to colonize every surface. The water is murky and the fungal smell mixes with decay.

name: Charred Ossuary Passage
description: A narrow corridor where bones have been baked into the walls by ancient heat. Some are blackened and cracked, others fused into the rock itself.

name: The Threshold
description: A crossroads cavern at the boundary of the upper warrens and the deeper caves. Each tunnel mouth is different — one drips, one glows, one steams, one rattles. The choice of which way to go feels permanent.

name: Echo Grotto
description: A domed chamber where every sound bounces endlessly. Water drips from stalactites into a shallow pool, each drop amplified into a thunderclap.
